hotel.name: Wienglakor Hotel
hotel.description: The most established mid-range hotel in Lampang, Wienglakor offers 100 well-maintained rooms with all the amenities expected at this level: swimming pool, on-site restaurant, fitness centre and meeting facilities. The hotel has been a Lampang institution for years and delivers reliable, comfortable accommodation with professional service. Its central location makes it a solid base for exploring the city, and the pool is a welcome bonus after hot days of temple-hopping.
highlights: Swimming pool — a major plus in Lampang's hot climate
100 rooms with minibar and complimentary water
On-site restaurant serving Thai and international cuisine
Central location with easy access to attractions
Professional service and reliable quality

similarHotels.name: Khelangnakorn Hotel
similarHotels.description: A long-standing Lampang institution and one of the best-value budget hotels in northern Thailand. Khelangnakorn Hotel offers clean, spacious air-conditioned rooms with hot water at prices that have barely changed in years. The central location puts you within walking distance of Baan Sao Nak, the riverside and most city centre temples. The hotel is no-frills but well-maintained, and the helpful front desk can arrange transport to outlying attractions.
highlights: Unbeatable value — large A/C rooms from 350 THB
Central location near temples and restaurants
On-site parking for those with rental cars or motorbikes
Helpful staff who can arrange transport to the Elephant Center
Walking distance to Kad Kong Ta walking street

similarHotels.name: Baan Chiang Bed Lampang
similarHotels.description: A modern, well-designed budget hotel that punches above its weight. Baan Chiang Bed offers compact but thoughtfully furnished rooms with quality mattresses, clean bathrooms and a minimalist aesthetic that would not look out of place at twice the price. The property is well-reviewed for cleanliness and friendly service. Located on Bandongpattana Road, it is a short walk to the Old Town and the main shopping areas.
highlights: Modern design and excellent cleanliness at budget prices
Quality mattresses — rare at this price point
Free Wi-Fi throughout the property
Friendly, attentive staff
Short walk to Old Town attractions and restaurants

similarHotels.name: C2 Residence Boutique Hotel
similarHotels.description: A modern boutique-style hotel offering clean, contemporary rooms at genuine budget prices. C2 Residence combines the style of a boutique property with the affordability of a guesthouse. Rooms are compact but well-appointed with quality bedding, modern bathrooms and air conditioning. The central location makes it easy to walk to most city attractions, and the rooftop area offers views over the city to the surrounding mountains.
highlights: Boutique style at budget prices
Modern rooms with quality furnishings
Central location for walking to attractions
Free Wi-Fi and good A/C
Rooftop area with city views

aiContent.hookIntro: Booking Wienglakor Hotel without knowing the central location exposes you to street noise until late evening.
aiContent.intro: Wienglakor Hotel provides reliable mid-range comfort with 100 well-maintained rooms featuring minibars and complimentary water, plus essentials like a swimming pool and on-site restaurant. It's ideal for families, business travelers, and those seeking professional service in Lampang's city center.
whyBook: Central spot for easy temple exploration on foot
Swimming pool refreshes after hot Lampang days
100 rooms with minibar and free water included
On-site restaurant offers Thai and international dishes
Professional service ensures smooth business stays
whyNotBook: Central location means traffic noise in road-facing rooms until 10pm
Fitness centre is basic without advanced equipment for serious workouts
Pool area lacks shade options during peak midday sun
Meeting facilities suit small groups but not large conferences
No shuttle service requires self-arranged transport to outskirts
aiContent.skipIf: Skip if you're a solo backpacker on a tight budget preferring hostels over structured hotels.
aiContent.detailedReview: Checking into Wienglakor Hotel feels straightforward and efficient, with professional staff handling registration quickly at the front desk in the bustling city center lobby. The 100 rooms deliver consistent comfort, each equipped with a minibar, complimentary water, and standard mid-range amenities like air conditioning and WiFi, though the decor leans functional rather than stylish, reflecting the hotel's established status. The standout swimming pool offers a practical escape from Lampang's heat, surrounded by basic lounge chairs for relaxation after visiting nearby temples. Meals at the on-site restaurant are reliable, serving straightforward Thai and international cuisine with fresh ingredients, though portions are moderate and variety limited for longer stays. Service stands out for its attentiveness—staff assist with local recommendations and handle requests promptly, creating a sense of reliability. Typical guests include families unwinding poolside and business travelers using the meeting facilities for regional meetings, drawn to the no-fuss professionalism in a city not overrun by tourists. Overall, it's a solid base without surprises, prioritizing comfort over flair in Lampang's quieter northern vibe.
aiContent.locationReality: Wienglakor Hotel sits in Lampang's city center, placing it within a 5-10 minute walk to key spots like the Kad Kong Ta night market and local shops. Major temples such as Wat Phra Kaew Don Tao are about 15 minutes away by Grab for around 100-150 THB. Outlying attractions like Wat Phra That Lampang Luang require a 20-30 minute drive, as the hotel lacks direct public transport links in this car-dependent area.
localSignals: 5-minute walk to Kad Kong Ta market
100 rooms total with minibar in each
Nearest airport transfer from Lampang Airport costs 300-500 THB by taxi
aiContent.travellerNote: Guests often praise the reliable service and central convenience but note occasional noise from nearby streets and basic fitness facilities.
bookingTips: Request a room away from the main road to minimize traffic sounds
Book via Agoda for frequent Thailand discounts on mid-range stays
Prices spike in November-February high season for northern festivals
Verify breakfast inclusion as it's not always standard in packages
Opt for superior room type for better pool views if available

faq.q: Does Wienglakor Hotel have a swimming pool?
faq.a: Yes, it features a swimming pool that's a key highlight for cooling off in Lampang's hot climate.

faq.q: What is the location of Wienglakor Hotel in Lampang?
faq.a: It's in the city center, offering easy access to local attractions and markets on foot.

faq.q: Is breakfast included at Wienglakor Hotel?
faq.a: Breakfast details vary by booking; check your package as it's not always complimentary.

faq.q: How many rooms does Wienglakor Hotel have?
faq.a: The hotel offers 100 well-maintained rooms with standard mid-range amenities.

faq.q: Is Wienglakor Hotel suitable for families?
faq.a: Yes, it's best for families due to its pool, spacious rooms, and central location.

faq.q: What dining options are at Wienglakor Hotel?
faq.a: The on-site restaurant serves Thai and international cuisine for convenient meals.

aiContent.urgencyLine: Rooms at Wienglakor Hotel with pool access book out 1-2 months ahead for Lampang's cool season—check today.
aiContent.methodology: We rated Wienglakor Hotel based on room quality, amenities, location, and guest feedback factors. We weighted central access and pool presence highest because they address Lampang's heat and exploration needs. Prices and availability change—always verify before booking. Last updated: 2026-04.
aiContent.metaDescription: Wienglakor Hotel in Lampang offers mid-range comfort with a swimming pool and central location for temple visits, though road noise can disrupt quiet evenings. Reliable for families—book now for best rates. (148 characters)
